description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical woven picnic basket with a pair of large, circular handles attached at the top. The basket is crafted from natural wicker or rattan, featuring alternating horizontal bands of cream and muted purple hues, giving it a distinctive striped appearance. The weave is tight and uniform, with a visible pattern that adds both strength and decorative appeal. The handles are thick, wrapped in the same material as the basket, and are attached with visible white fastenings. The front of the basket displays a decorative closure system with looped fasteners, enhancing its visual interest. The interior is spacious and open, suitable for carrying food or personal items during outings.
description: A tall, cylindrical woven picnic basket with circular handles and decorative horizontal stripes in cream and purple. Features a looped closure system and a spacious open interior.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open, cylindrical interior and the two upright circular handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the decorative looped closure system and the full circular handles stacked together.
description_view_2: Top-down view from the opposite side, again showing the open interior and handles, with less emphasis on the closure.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, but closure details are less visible; handles and weave pattern are prominent.
attribute_handle_type: Two large, circular, hinged handles made of braided wicker, attached with visible fastenings.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, uniform plain weave with horizontal decorative bands in alternating colors.
attribute_closure_mechanism: looped toggle closure made of wicker or leather
